item.title: 美国国际贸易法院暂停3月5日关于关税退还的命令
item.description: 美国国际贸易法院周五暂停了3月5日的一项命令，该命令要求美国海关与边境保护局在关税退还问题上"立即执行"。【原文：The U.S. ​Court Of ‌International Trade on ​Friday ​suspended a March ⁠5 ​order ​that directed U.S. Customs ​and ​Border Protection on ‌tariff ⁠refunds "to the extent that ​it ​directs ⁠immediate compliance."】

item.title: 彭博社报道，甲骨文和OpenAI放弃得克萨斯州数据中心扩建计划
item.description: 彭博新闻社周五援引知情人士消息报道称，甲骨文公司和OpenAI已放弃在得克萨斯州扩建旗舰人工智能数据中心的计划，原因是融资谈判陷入僵局，且OpenAI的需求发生变化。【原文：Oracle and OpenAI have abandoned plans to expand a flagship artificial intelligence data center ​in Texas after negotiations dragged over financing and OpenAI's ‌changing needs, Bloomberg News reported on Friday, citing people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 美国将为墨西哥湾海运损失提供最高约200亿美元的再保险，美国政府机构称。
item.description: 美国国际开发金融公司周五表示，美国将为海湾地区提供最高200亿美元的损失再保险，以在对伊朗战争期间为石油和天然气运输商提供信心保障。【原文：The U.S. will provide reinsurance for losses up to $20 billion in the ​Gulf region, to help provide ​confidence for oil and gas ⁠shippers during the war on Iran, ​the U.S. International Development Finance ​Corporation said on Friday.】

item.title: 彭博社报道：波音公司即将获得500架喷气式飞机订单，正值特朗普与习近平峰会之际
item.description: 波音公司即将达成其历史上最大规模的销售之一——一份500架737 MAX客机的订单。据彭博社周五援引知情人士报道，该订单将在美国总统特朗普自2017年以来首次对中国进行国事访问期间正式公布。【原文：Boeing is closing in ‌on one of the largest sales in its history, a 500-aircraft order for 737 Max jets set to ​be unveiled when U.S. President Donald Trump ​travels to Beijing for his first state ⁠visit to China since 2017, Bloomberg News reported ​on Friday, citing people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 惠誉称2025年美国私募信贷违约率将创纪录升至9.2%
item.description: 据信用评级机构惠誉周五发布的报告显示，2025年美国企业私募信贷借款人的违约率攀升至创纪录的9.2%。【原文：The default rate among U.S. corporate borrowers of private credit rose to a record 9.2% in 2025, ​according to a report Friday by credit rating agency ‌Fitch Ratings.】

item.title: 在官方称赞采矿潜力后，美国允许部分委内瑞拉黄金交易
item.description: 美国财政部网站显示，美国政府周五颁发了一项许可证，允许涉及委内瑞拉产黄金的特定交易。此前一天，美国内政部长道格·伯格姆结束了对这个南美国家的访问，此行重点关注采矿业。【原文：The United States on Friday issued ​a license authorizing certain transactions involving Venezuelan-origin gold, the Treasury Department website showed, a day after ‌U.S. Interior Secretary Doug Burgum wrapped up a visit to the South American country focused on mining.】

item.title: 澳大利亚央行官员表示，美元仍是投资者的避风港
item.description: 澳大利亚央行一位高层周五表示，美国"超额特权"的时代可能即将终结，但本周中东战争后美元避险行情的反弹表明，任何变化都将缓慢如冰川移动。【原文：A top Australian central banker said on Friday that the days of U.S. "exorbitant privilege" may be coming to an end, ​but the dollar's safe-haven rally this week after the ‌Middle East war suggests any change will be glacial.】

item.title: 美联储官员哈马克表示，利率可能在一段时间内维持不变
item.description: 克利夫兰联邦储备银行行长贝丝·哈马克周五表示，在通胀仍"过高"的经济环境下，她认为目前没有迫切需要改变货币政策立场。【原文：Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland President Beth Hammack said Friday she sees no imminent need to change the stance of monetary policy in an economy ​where inflation is still “too high.”】

item.title: 美联储委员柯林斯认为利率政策将在一段时间内保持稳定
item.description: 波士顿联邦储备银行行长苏珊·柯林斯周五表示，她认为目前没有迫切需要调整利率，而放松货币政策的前景取决于通胀率能否进一步回落至2%的目标水平。【原文：Federal Reserve Bank of Boston President Susan ​Collins said on Friday she sees no looming need to change interest rates, with ‌the outlook for easing monetary policy contingent on a further retreat to the 2% inflation target.】

item.title: 卡尔希因伊朗领导人预测市场遭撤销而被起诉
item.description: 据周四提交的一份集体诉讼称，卡尔希预测市场因未能向押注伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊将在2026年3月1日前离职的人支付5400万美元而遭到起诉。【原文：Kalshi prediction market was sued for a failure to pay out $54 million to people who bet that Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah ​Ali Khamenei would leave office before March 1, 2026, according ‌to a class action lawsuit filed on Thursday.】

item.title: 石油衍生品交易员认为中东冲击将短暂消退
item.description: 原油期权和期货的走势表明，最新的中东冲突可能短暂，因交易员纷纷涌入那些在价格初始飙升后因回落而获利的结构性交易。【原文：Oil options and futures are signalling that the latest Middle East conflict may be short‑lived, as traders pile into structures that profit from a retreat in prices after the initial spike.】

item.title: 美以对伊朗开战引发全球商业震动
item.description: 美以两国与伊朗的战争正令全球企业惶惶不安，推高能源价格，挤压关键原材料供应，并引发对贸易路线可靠性的质疑——这些路线对从食品到汽车零部件等商品流通至关重要。【原文：The U.S.-Israeli war with Iran is rattling businesses worldwide, driving up energy prices, squeezing supplies of critical raw materials and raising questions about the reliability of trade routes critical to the flow ​of goods from food to car parts.】

item.title: 美国证券交易委员会对纽约证券交易所处以900万美元罚款，因其系统故障导致股市交易中断
item.description: 纽约证券交易所已同意支付900万美元民事罚款，以解决美国证券交易委员会对其2023年1月因计算机故障导致股市开盘中断、引发蓝筹股价格剧烈波动的指控。【原文：The New York Stock Exchange has agreed to pay a $9 million civil fine ​to settle U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission charges over ‌a computer glitch that disrupted the stock market open in January 2023, causing wild swings in the prices of blue-chip stocks.】

item.title: 新兴市场股票基金下跌，伊朗冲突引发抛售潮
item.description: 新兴市场股票基金本月大幅下跌，因投资者在伊朗冲突升级之际削减风险资产配置，使其成为各类资产中表现最差的基金之一。【原文：Emerging market equity funds have posted steep declines this month as investors cut exposure to risk ​assets amid the escalating Iran conflict, making them among ‌the worst performers across asset classes.】

item.title: 快时尚服装在南亚堆积如山，中东冲突导致航班停飞
item.description: 据三家制造商透露，由于中东冲突迫使阿联酋航空和卡塔尔航空等航司取消航班，Zara母公司Inditex及其他主要服装零售商的服装货运目前滞留在孟加拉国和印度的机场。【原文：Shipments of garments for Zara owner ​Inditex and other major clothing retailers are stranded at airports in Bangladesh and India, according to three manufacturers, ‌as the conflict in the Middle East forces airlines such as Emirates and Qatar Airways to cancel flights.】

item.title: 美联储施密德称招聘因人工智能与老龄化暂缓
item.description: 堪萨斯城联邦储备银行行长杰夫·施密德周五表示，他认为人工智能的兴起正促使部分企业暂停招聘，而人口老龄化也在劳动力市场引发实质性结构性变革。【原文：Kansas City Federal Reserve President Jeff Schmid ​on Friday said he ‌believes that the advent of artificial intelligence is leading ​some businesses to pause ​hiring even as an aging ⁠population is creating ​real structural change in the ​labor market.】

item.title: 美敦力旗下糖尿病业务MiniMed估值53亿美元，纳斯达克首日上市股价下跌
item.description: 医疗设备制造商美敦力旗下糖尿病业务MiniMed的股票周五在纳斯达克上市首日开盘价较发行价下跌4.8%，公司估值达53亿美元。【原文：Shares of MiniMed , the ​diabetes business of medical device ‌maker Medtronic , opened 4.8% below their offer price in their Nasdaq ​debut on Friday, valuing ​it at $5.3 billion.】

item.title: 五角大楼任命前狗狗币官员领导其人工智能工作
item.description: 五角大楼周五任命了一位计算机科学家担任首席数据官，该人士去年曾协助亿万富翁埃隆·马斯克推动政府改革，同时在网络上为白人至上主义者和厌女者提供支持。【原文：The Pentagon on Friday named as Chief Data Officer a computer ​scientist who aided billionaire Elon Musk's ‌efforts to overhaul the government last year and who has boosted white supremacists and misogynists online.】

item.title: 消息人士称，巴西高尔航空将启用新型A330客机开通里约长途航线
item.description: 据两位知情人士透露，巴西高尔航空公司将于周五宣布，里约热内卢加利昂国际机场将成为其新引进空客A330-900机型的枢纽机场。【原文：Brazilian airline Gol will announce ​on Friday that Rio de Janeiro's ‌Galeao international airport will serve as the hub for its new Airbus A330-900 aircraft entering ​the fleet, according to two sources ​familiar with the plans.】

item.title: 美国海关机构称关税退税系统将在45天内准备就绪
item.description: 美国海关官员周五在法庭文件中表示，该机构正筹建一套系统，将在45天内完成对非法征收关税的退税处理，且无需进口商提起诉讼。【原文：The U.S. customs agency is preparing a system that will be ​ready to process refunds on illegally ‌collected tariffs in 45 days without requiring importers to sue, a customs official said in ​a court filing on Friday.】

item.title: 美国海关总署称，根据《国际紧急经济权力法》征收的关税已达1660亿美元
item.description: 美国海关与边境保护局周五表示，在特朗普总统实施的紧急关税政策下，该机构已征收约1660亿美元关税和押金。该政策此前已被最高法院裁定无效。【原文：The U.S. Customs and Border ​Protection agency said ‌on Friday it collected about $166 billion in duties ​and deposits under ​the emergency tariffs imposed ⁠by President Donald ​Trump that were struck ​down by the Supreme Court.】

item.title: 加拿大美加贸易部长将在华盛顿会见美国贸易主管
item.description: 加拿大负责美加贸易关系的部长多米尼克·勒布朗的办公室证实，他将于周五在华盛顿与美国贸易代表杰米森·格里尔会晤。两国即将启动对《北美自由贸易协定》的正式审查，该协定还包括墨西哥。【原文：Canada's minister in charge of ​trade relations with the U.S., Dominic LeBlanc, will meet with his U.S. ‌counterpart Jamieson Greer on Friday in Washington, the minister's office confirmed, as the two countries come close to an official review of the North American free trade pact which also includes Mexico.】

item.title: 美国海关机构称无法遵守关税退还命令
item.description: 美国海关与边境保护局周五向美国国际贸易法院提交的法庭文件中表示，该机构无法遵守法院要求其退还关税的命令——这些关税已被最高法院裁定为非法。【原文：The ​U.S. Customs and ‌Border Protection agency is ​unable to ​comply with a court ⁠order ​directing it to ​refund tariffs that the Supreme Court has ​ruled ​illegal, the agency said in a ‌court ⁠filing with the U.S. Court for ​International ​Trade ⁠on Friday.】

item.title: 美国企业库存12月小幅上升
item.description: 美国政府周五公布的数据显示，12月美国企业库存小幅上升，零售商库存出现反弹。【原文：U.S. business inventories edged up in December amid a rebound in ​stocks at retailers, government data showed on ‌Friday.】

item.title: 据文件显示，英国石油公司寻求通过Venture Global仲裁获得至少37亿美元赔偿。
item.description: 据Venture Global年度报告显示，英国石油公司（BP）在针对液化天然气（LNG）货物的仲裁案中胜诉，正寻求至少37亿美元赔偿。【原文：BP is seeking ‌at least $3.7 billion from its arbitration win against Venture Global in a case concerning liquefied natural gas (LNG) cargoes, Venture Global's annual report shows.】

item.title: 研究表明，将私人数据与官方数据相结合将更好地指导美联储决策。
item.description: 顶尖经济学家团队得出结论：通过将私人数据纳入政府经济报告，可帮助官员更准确预测就业与通胀变化，从而提升美联储的政策制定水平。【原文：Bolstering government economic reports with private data could improve Federal Reserve policymaking by helping officials better anticipate changes in jobs and inflation, a team of top economists has concluded.】

item.title: 中国最大省级经济体誓言以人工智能重塑产业格局
item.description: 中国南部制造业和科技中心广东的官员及企业高管周五承诺，将在该省2万亿美元的经济体中全面推广人工智能应用。此前一天，北京刚刚推出"人工智能+"战略，旨在将这项技术融入经济发展的各个领域。【原文：Officials and executives in Guangdong, China's southern manufacturing and tech hub, on Friday vowed to expand artificial intelligence across its $2 trillion economy, a day ​after Beijing launched an AI plus strategy to embed the technology throughout the ‌economy.】

item.title: 美国机构将与Waymo、Zoox、Aurora首席执行官共同举办自动驾驶安全论坛
item.description: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局将于周二举办全国自动驾驶汽车安全论坛，届时将邀请自动驾驶公司Waymo、Zoox和Aurora的首席执行官出席。【原文：The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration ​will hold a national ‌autonomous vehicle safety forum that will include the CEOs ​of self-driving companies ​Waymo, Zoox and Aurora on ⁠Tuesday.】

item.title: 投资者紧抓避险交易，伊朗战争令经济前景完全不明朗
item.description: Some of the most crowded trades of the past year are emerging as the key shock absorbers for any potential market pain as war in the Middle East moves into a second week, bringing visibility over inflation and monetary policy to ​zero.

item.title: 罗宾汉面向散户投资者的6.58亿美元私募市场基金公开发售
item.description: 罗宾汉公司周五在纽约证券交易所推出其旗舰风险投资基金，规模达6.584亿美元，为散户投资者提供了难得的机会，使其能够投资于备受瞩目的私营科技公司。【原文：Robinhood debuted its flagship $658.4 million venture fund on the New York Stock Exchange on Friday, offering retail investors a rare chance to ​invest in high-profile, privately held technology companies.】
